"'''The Business of Bacta'''" is an RPG source article written by [[Michael Kogge]]. It was first published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 3|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 3]] and later archived on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]]. The article detailed the creation and sale of [[Bacta/Legends|Bacta]].
